method.note: Baseline regenerated in this experiment (not historical DB package). At T=0.7, VO wording varies across arms; qualitative world/structure judgment preferred over raw token similarity for influence.
method.marker_fix: Section headers disambiguated after first run false-positive on CREATIVE IDENTITY prose mentions.
